stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying under VFR by DR along a track of 312°(T), heading 310°(M) to account for the wind, and the variation of 2°W. On the first part of the leg, the pilot sees several gliders and turns to the left off the intended track to avoid them. After clearing the gliders the pilot spots a railway bridge and is able to fix the position of the aircraft. Determine the best magnetic heading to fly to the next check feature, given:

Fix position: 15 NM from the start of the leg and 2 NM off track
Distance to the next check feature: 18 NM
